title: Successfully represented affected parties in an appeal concerning the distribution of assets from family trusts
content:
## Successfully represented affected parties in an appeal concerning the distribution of assets from family trusts
On February 2, 2022, McCarthy Tétrault successfully represented affected parties in an appeal concerning the distribution of assets from family trusts.
This appeal arose out of a liability trial dealing with alleged breaches of fiduciary duty and subsequent proceedings dealing with the scope of a disgorgement order. The main issue at trial was whether the defendants, trustees of several separate family trusts, breached their fiduciary duties to the plaintiffs/beneficiaries of one such trust by winding up the trusts and distributing the trusts’ assets while in an alleged conflict of interest.
McCarthy Tétrault LLP represented affected parties with a team led by Michael Feder, Q.C. and Jill Yates that included Connor Bildfell.
